{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Lichborn heavy shuttle
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Lichborn heavy shuttle]] is a captured vessel piloted by [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
